results.rendered_html: sālokya n. (fr. sa-loka) the being in the same sphere or world, residence in the same heaven with (instr. with saha, or gen., or comp.; this is one of the four stages of beatitude),  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;  Pur.  &c.
